problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
mechanism: DNA computing for massively parallel search
hypothesis: If DNA computing for massively parallel search is applied to alphafold, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Theoretical complexity proof with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
